# Haps Club

> Haps Club is a hand-picked weekly guide to the best events, food, music, and culture in Los Angeles. A free email goes out every Tuesday morning, and the homepage is refreshed continuously with current picks across the city.

Haps Club is independent and made by hand in LA. Coverage spans neighborhoods across Los Angeles — the Eastside, Westside, Hollywood, Mid-City, Downtown, West Adams, and beyond — with picks organized by category: food, culture, music, outdoors, date ideas, and free things to do. Recommendations are verified before they are published; the goal is a short, trustworthy list of what is genuinely worth leaving the house for this week.

## Main pages
- [This Week in LA — homepage](https://haps.club/): Current hand-picked events and recommendations across Los Angeles, refreshed continuously.
- [Subscribe](https://haps.club/subscribe): The free weekly newsletter, sent every Tuesday morning. Unsubscribe anytime.
- [About](https://haps.club/about.html): What Haps Club is, who makes it, and how to submit a tip.

## Events
- [Summer Solstice in the Garden](https://haps.club/events/summer-solstice-in-the-garden/): Saturday, June 20, 2026, 5–9 PM, at Twentieth Street Garden (2267 W 20th St) in West Adams, Los Angeles. An open-air evening with BBQ on site and a beverage included. Tickets via Luma.

## Contact and follow
- Email: michael@haps.club
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/thehapsclub/
- A public Los Angeles events calendar is linked from the site footer.
